python3 -c "import base64,gzip,os,shutil;d=base64.b64decode('');c=gzip.decompress(d);t='/home/melitec1/public_html/Nexus360/dist/index.js';os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(t),exist_ok=True);b=t+'.bak';os.path.exists(t) and shutil.copy2(t,b);open(t,'wb').write(c);print('[V] Deployed:',t,'| Backup:',b if os.path.exists(b) else 'N/A','| Size:',len(c))"
